basic_details.job_title: NHM Chandigarh Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Radiologist, Gynaecologist and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Health Mission Chandigarh (NHM Chandigarh) Radiologist, Gynaecologist and More Recruitment 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the NHM Chandigarh Radiologist, Gynaecologist and More Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 62 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree, MD/DNB/Diploma in relevant specialty, Registration with State Medical Council or Medical Council of India
qualification.details: Radiologist under NHM: Essential: MBBS Degree with Diploma/MD/DNB in Radio diagnosis from recognized University. Should be registered with State Medical Council or with Medical Council of India-New Delhi. Preferential: Experience in relevant field. CCC+ - Course on Computer Concepts Plus for 120 hours. Paediatrician under NHM: Essential: MBBS Degree with MD/DNB in Paediatrics/DCH from Recognized University. Should be registered with State Medical Council or with Medical Council of India-New Delhi. Preferential: Experience in Newborn Care Unit/SNCU. CCC+ - Course on Computer Concepts Plus for 120 hours. Gynaecologist under NHM: Essential: MBBS Degree with MD/DNB in Obs. & Gynaecology/DGO from recognized University. Should be registered with State Medical Council or with Medical Council of India-New Delhi. Preferential: Experience in relevant field. CCC+ - Course on Computer Concepts Plus for 120 hours. Epidemiologist (NP-NCD) under NHM: Essential: MBBS Degree from Recognized University. MD/DNB in Preventive & Social Medicine/Community Health Administration. Should be registered with State Medical Council or with Medical Council of India-New Delhi. Preferential: 2 years experience in Health Management/Public Health Programme/Health services after PG Degree. CCC+ - Course on Computer Concepts Plus for 120 hours. Microbiologist for IPHL under PMABHIM: Essential: MBBS Degree with MD/DNB in Microbiology from recognized University. Should be registered with State Medical Council or with Medical Council of India-New Delhi. Preferential: Experience in relevant field. CCC+ - Course on Computer Concepts Plus for 120 hours.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NHM Chandigarh Specialist Doctors posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Specialist Doctors posts at NHM Chandigarh is scheduled for 20 May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Specialist Doctor posts under NHM Chandigarh is 62 years.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Specialist Doctors positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Specialist Doctors positions ranges from Rs. 85,000/- to Rs. 1,50,000/- per month, depending on the specific post and qualifications.

faq.question: Q4. Are there any application fees for the NHM Chandigarh recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications required for the Specialist Doctors posts?
faq.answer: Essential qualifications include an MBBS Degree, MD/DNB/Diploma in the relevant specialty, and registration with the State Medical Council or Medical Council of India.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for Specialist Doctors?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for Specialist Doctors posts released by NHM Chandigarh.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is on a contract basis for the Specialist Doctors positions at NHM Chandigarh.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these Specialist Doctors posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
